title: Learning to skateboard
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: A few months ago, I decided to learn how to skateboard. At first, I found it extremely difficult to balance properly, and I fell over several times. My friend Jake, who is very good (27) skateboarding, offered to teach me. We practised every Saturday afternoon at a park near my house. Jake explained that improving is very different (28) what most beginners expect. After a few weeks, I became more confident and was finally able to turn corners smoothly. Last weekend, I learned how to go down a small ramp without stopping. I was pleased (29) myself because I had worked hard to improve. Some people think skateboarding is dangerous, but I believe it is safe (30) you wear the right equipment. I still make mistakes sometimes, although I now enjoy the sport much more (31) before. I hope to become skilled enough to enter a competition (32) day.
